sourceMovie.title: Memory
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Memory for the same reason it broke through in 2022: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a thriller rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Martin Campbell keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The action and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Extraction 2
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Memory clicked for you, Extraction 2 (2023) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and thriller, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Memory?
faq.answer: Try Extraction 2, The International, The Long Kiss Goodnight—each shares DNA with Memory while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Memory?
faq.answer: Memory (2022) is best described as Action, Thriller, Crime. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Memory worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.7/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
